summary.short: Interventional cardiologist running a busy cath lab in Kochi — 600+ angioplasties a year and the district's first round-the-clock primary-PCI service.
summary.long: Consultant cardiologist with fifteen years in interventional practice. Splits his week between the cath lab, a post-heart-attack follow-up clinic he set up, and teaching the DM residents. Set up the first 24x7 primary-angioplasty service in the district, which is the part of the work he is proudest of.

current_roles.title: Consultant Interventional Cardiologist
highlights: Ran a cath lab through 600+ angioplasties a year, holding door-to-balloon times under 60 minutes.
Built the district's first 24x7 primary-PCI service and brought heart-attack transfer deaths in the catchment down about 40%.
Trained the DM cardiology residents on complex coronary work; 6 have gone on to consultant posts.
Started a post-heart-attack follow-up clinic that kept 80% of patients on their medication at one year.
Cut bleeding complications roughly 30% by making radial-access angioplasty the lab's default approach.

past_roles.title: Cardiologist, Cath-Lab Team
highlights: Handled the cath-lab emergency roster and built the STEMI protocol the unit still uses.

achievements: Built the district's first 24x7 primary-angioplasty service from a standing start.
Delivered over 6,000 coronary procedures across 15 years with outcomes at national benchmark.
Trained 6 DM residents who now hold consultant cardiology posts.
Ran free heart-health camps twice a year that have screened more than 4,000 people.
